description: Banco Comafi S.A. provides commercial banking and financial products and services to individuals, businesses, small and medium enterprises, companies, and corporate customers in Argentina. It offers accounts, cards, loans, insurance, savings and investment, pension plans, financing services, payments and collection, financial leasing, cash management, safe deposit boxes, and foreign trade, as well as online, mobile, electronic, telephone, and internet banking services. The company was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
